title: parrhesiazomai #3955
definition:
1) to use freedom in speaking, be free spoken
    1a) to speak freely
 2) to grow confident, have boldness, show assurance, assume a bold
    bearing
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) to use freedom in speaking, be free spoken
    1a) to speak freely
 2) to grow confident, have boldness, show assurance, assume a bold
    bearing

    NASB:  to speak freely or boldly:
